title: trigger rollover
text: trigger rollover Interactive trigger for the umap widget that handles processing when a user moves the cursor into a map polygon and the Sense property has been set to rollover . When this happens, the rollover image demarcates the polygon. Explain this code trigger rollover params string polygonTagName: in endparams ; <Your code here> end ; trigger rollover Copy Applies to: Form widgets: umap (Map) Activation: Activated when a user moves the cursor into a map polygon and the Sense property has been set to rollover . When this happens, the rollover image demarcates the polygon. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Parameters polygonTagName —tag name of the highlighted hotspot Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
